{{Quote|Foolish Gungans will now know what becomes of those who cross a Hutt. I have dispatch my most feared champion, Mordran, to bring pain and wisdom to those traders who thought they could back out of a business venture without proper compensation paid to me. Their Sacred Place will be of no protection against Mordran. There is none who can stand up against him and save these Gungans. Ha ha ha. Mordran shall bring me my payment ... in Gungan hide!|[[Borvo]] the Hutt|<ref name="10HSTG">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Travel%20Guide|text=10 Hot Spots Travel Guide}}</ref>}}
'''Mordran''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] employed by [[Borvo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:POI" /> After a lot of hard work, he became one of Borvo's champions. His next mission was to go to the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]] and wipe out a group of [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] traders that crossed Borvo.<ref name="10HSTG" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] learned about the legendary fighting skills of Mordran and challenged him to a duel.<ref name="SWG:POI" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mordran appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:POI" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Mordran can be found near the Gungan Sacred Place on Naboo, close to [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Boss Nass]].<ref name="SWG:POI" /> Mordran was added to the game with the update named "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]," released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref>
